title: A&R
content:
A&R
Working on the music with the artist
Supporting artist
Helping shape the music and the story
Remixes
Domestic bookings

Management
Building release strategy
Creating a timeline
Working with press teams
Assure everyone is informed

Publishing
Copyright of songs
Manage internally and externally catalogue of music
Insure management of any writing activity of artist
Negotiate percentage splits on tracks
Synchronization

Art Director

Foreign booking agent

PR / publicist







Weekly email w.tasks
